headline-chat.purpose: Active group name; semibold xl, count muted.

meta-caption.purpose: Uppercase extrabold tracked labels in settings and list.

motion.name: message-spring
motion.purpose: New message row entrance in thread.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Hover color transitions on list rows and icons.

components.name: Messaging primary button
components.description: Accent CTA; uses --council-accent and hover token.
components.css: .ds-btn-messaging-primary { background: var(--council-accent); color: var(--council-bubble-advisor); border: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 20px 40px; font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 12px 32px -8px rgba(5, 120, 65, 0.35); transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-messaging-primary:hover { background: var(--council-accent-hover); } .ds-btn-messaging-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--council-accent); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Send button (ready state)
components.css: .ds-btn-send-ready { background: var(--council-accent); color: var(--council-bubble-advisor); border: none; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 10px 40px; height: 36px; font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 12px 28px -6px rgba(5, 120, 65, 0.4); transition: background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), transform 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-btn-send-ready:hover { background: var(--council-accent-hover); } .ds-btn-send-ready:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--council-accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Advisor message bubble
components.description: Warm paper bubble with tail; translation row below.
components.html: Consider the council's next move.
components.css: .ds-bubble-advisor-wrap { max-width: 70%; } .ds-bubble-advisor { position: relative; background: var(--council-bubble-advisor); color: var(--foreground); border-radius: 16px; border-top-left-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.625; box-shadow: 0 14px 40px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.14), 0 0 0 1px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.06); font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-bubble-advisor::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; left: -12px; border: 7px solid transparent; border-top-color: var(--council-bubble-advisor); border-right-color: var(--council-bubble-advisor); }

components.name: User message bubble
components.css: .ds-bubble-user-wrap { max-width: 70%; margin-left: auto; } .ds-bubble-user { position: relative; background: var(--council-bubble-user); color: var(--foreground); border-radius: 16px; border-top-right-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.625; box-shadow: 0 12px 32px -8px rgba(25, 130, 55, 0.28); font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-bubble-user::before { content: ''; position: absolute; top: 0; right: -12px; border: 7px solid transparent; border-top-color: var(--council-bubble-user); border-left-color: var(--council-bubble-user); }

components.name: Left rail nav
components.description: Gradient rail; icon buttons with active pill.
components.html: <nav class="ds-rail" aria-label="Main"><button type="button" class="ds-rail-icon ds-rail-icon--active" aria-current="true"><svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2"><path d="M21 15a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H7l-4 4V5a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h14a2 2 0 0 1 2 2z"/></svg></button></nav>
components.css: .ds-rail { width: 64px; background: linear-gradient(180deg, var(--council-rail), var(--council-rail-deep)); display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; padding-top: 24px; box-shadow: inset -1px 0 0 rgba(0,0,0,0.12); } .ds-rail-icon { background: none; border: none; color: var(--council-rail-icon); padding: 8px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 12px; transition: color 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1), background 0.2s cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); } .ds-rail-icon:hover { color: #f5f5f4; } .ds-rail-icon--active { color: var(--council-accent); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.12); } .ds-rail-icon:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--council-accent); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Modal dialog shell
components.html: New council
components.css: .ds-modal-scrim { position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.45); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 16px; } .ds-modal-panel { width: 100%; max-width: 520px; background: var(--council-bubble-advisor); border: 1px solid var(--council-hairline); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 20px 50px -12px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.18); padding: 16px 24px 24px; font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-modal-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; margin: 0 0 12px; color: var(--foreground); }

components.name: Text input (modal field)
components.css: .ds-input-modal { width: 100%; border: 1px solid var(--council-hairline); border-radius: 8px; padding: 8px 12px; font-size: 14px; font-family: 'Geist Variable', system-ui, sans-serif; outline: none; transition: border-color 0.15s ease, box-shadow 0.15s ease; } .ds-input-modal:focus-visible { border-color: var(--council-accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(5, 150, 85, 0.25); } .ds-input-modal::placeholder { color: var(--council-text-muted); }

narrative.overview: Council AI reads like a mobile messenger shell adapted for slow deliberation. Canonical council shell colors are OKLCH tokens --council-* on :root in src/index.css, mapped to Tailwind via @theme. One green accent carries navigation and commitment UI; warm neutrals separate rail, list, and canvas without SaaS chrome clichés.
keyCharacteristics: Thread first: chat column and bubbles dominate.
One green voice: --council-accent for wayfinding and primary actions.
Warm neutrals: tinted OKLCH grays; advisor bubbles use warm paper token.
Bolder hierarchy: semibold chat title, tracked section caps, 15 to 16px thread and composer type.

rules.name: The One Green Rule
rules.body: --council-accent is the only saturated green for shell chrome and commitment actions.

rules.name: The Bubble Contrast Rule
rules.body: Advisor bubbles use --council-bubble-advisor on --council-canvas; user bubbles use --council-bubble-user; tails match fills.

rules.name: The Thread Width Rule
rules.body: Bubble column stays near 70% max width of the chat column.

rules.name: The Flat Rail Rule
rules.body: Rail and list avoid decorative shadows; separation is color, rail gradient, and borders.

dos: Do use --council-* tokens for new shell surfaces.
Do keep persona flavor in messages and Moments.
Do use hairlines and tonal steps before shadows on structural columns.
donts: Don't use gradient text for emphasis.
Don't add full-panel blur behind the thread by default.
Don't use thick colored side stripes on rows.
Don't nest cards around the thread.
